new_claims.claim_text: One of two US pilots who went missing after being downed over Iran has been RESCUED, per CBS.
new_claims.notes: Claim from low-trust source (T0), mentions CBS but no direct citation. Video shows generic plane and parachute/cargo, not explicit rescue.

new_claims.claim_text: Iranian Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) announce the downing of an American F-15 fighter jet on Qeshm Island.
new_claims.notes: Claim from low-trust source (T0), video appears generic, users question its authenticity ('game clip', 'not an F-15').

new_claims.claim_text: Iran has released footage of its bunkers, claiming they are invisible and imperceptible to anyone.
new_claims.notes: Claim from low-trust source (T0), video shows desert landscape and concrete structure, but invisibility/imperceptibility is unverified.
